qe6502 JS manual tests

Run the browser/WASM smoke test, Klaus2m5 suite, or fetch SingleStepTests directly from GitHub and inspect the output directly in the page.

Ready.

      

        Serve this directory over HTTP after a WASM build, for example:
        python3 -m http.server -d build/release_wasm/harness/js_manual 8000.
        SingleStepTests can be downloaded on demand from
        https://raw.githubusercontent.com/SingleStepTests/65x02/main/,
        or loaded from a local 00.json..ff.json file/folder when the browser cannot reach GitHub.
